BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-Chat
BundleInfo.Author: Bing-Rui Zhou
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Chat with your structures in ChimeraX
BundleInfo.Description: AI interactive interface to chat with your structures using natural language and the Gemini API.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Tool :: AI Chat :: AI Assistants :: Chat with your structure using AI
